metadata.description: Create, cook, and pass down the recipes your family loves — beautifully, together.

newRecipe.name: New recipe
newRecipe.description: Start a new recipe or import one from a link.

plan.name: Meal plan
plan.description: Plan meals for the week ahead.

shopping.name: Shopping list
shopping.description: Review and check off your shopping list.

household.label: Cooking for
household.hintUnset: Recipes use their own servings. Set this to auto-scale Cook Mode and shopping lists.
household.hintSet: Cook Mode and shopping lists start scaled to your family.

accessibilityMenu.title: Accessibility & comfort
accessibilityMenu.description: Tune how Heirloom looks and reads. These settings work with any theme and are saved on this device.

contrast.title: High contrast
contrast.description: Stronger text and borders for easier reading.
contrast.descriptionSystem: Following your system setting. Stronger text and borders.

motion.title: Reduce motion
motion.descriptionSystem: Following your system setting. Animations are turned off.

reading.title: Easy-reading text
reading.description: Roomier spacing and a highly legible typeface.

kids.title: Kids mode
kids.description: Big buttons, bright colors, and simpler screens.
